overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a medieval castle wall at night, descending through stone pathways to a harbor, and finally walking onto a wooden dock overlooking the water. The scene features atmospheric lighting with burning braziers against a blue night sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated stone walkway with harbor visible to the right

entered.detail: high medieval stone fortification wall with weathered bricks
low stone railing along the edge of the walkway
large metal fire bowl burning with orange flames
dark blue water of the harbor below
medieval city skyline with lit windows across the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated stone castle walkway at night. A tall stone wall runs along the left while a low parapet on the right overlooks the dark harbor waters. Burning braziers provide warm orange light against the cool blue night, with the distant city visible across the water.

events.description: turns right off main wall path toward wooden gazebo structure
begins descending stone staircase toward lower harbor level

agents.ego_description: turning right past a small harbor building and walking down stone stairs

notable_agents.action: man in red tunic standing near the water's edge looking at harbor

entered.detail: small wooden harbor structure with lit interior and arched entrance
worn stone steps descending toward the lower harbor path

segments.scene_description: Turning off the main wall into a semi-enclosed area with a wooden gazebo structure. The character descends a flight of stone stairs toward the lower harbor level, passing a man in red standing near the water. The stone wall of the castle remains visible but recedes to the left.

events.description: passes close to stone wall corner temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking along the lower stone path beside the harbor, passing a man looking at the water

notable_agents.action: man in striped shirt leaning against railing gazing at harbor

entered.detail: low stone barrier separating path from water drop

segments.scene_description: Walking along the lower harbor promenade on stone paving. The path runs between a stone wall on the left and a railing overlooking the water on the right. A man in a striped shirt stands by the railing looking out at the harbor. The wooden gazebo is left behind as the path continues along the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside dirt path descending to shore

events.description: transitions from stone pavement to dirt trail along rocky cliff edge
wooden dock and sailing ship come into view around cliff bend

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow dirt path cut into the cliffside, descending toward the shore

entered.detail: rough natural rock wall with patches of grass and moss
narrow unpaved path with grass edges along the cliff
long wooden pier extending into the harbor water
medieval sailing vessel with large canvas sail moored near dock

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts from built stone to natural cliffside. Walking along a narrow dirt trail cut into the rock face with the harbor visible below. The path descends toward a wooden dock that comes into view around the bend, with a sailing ship moored nearby. Vegetation increases along the rocky edges.

events.description: steps onto wooden dock from shore path
stops at end of dock to look at city skyline across water

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden dock and stopping at the end to observe the harbor and distant city lights

notable_agents.action: figure in armor standing near dock entrance facing the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the pier surface extending over water

segments.scene_description: Walking onto a long wooden pier extending into the harbor. The sailing ship is now close on the left, moored to the dock. The character walks to the end of the pier and stops, looking out at the expansive water and the illuminated city skyline in the distance. The sky is fully visible overhead, and the dock planks creak underfoot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an elevated castle fortification down to a bustling harbor promenade at night. It begins along a high stone walkway where burning braziers cast a warm orange glow against the cool blue sky and the distant city lights. As the camera turns away from the main wall, the scene shifts into a semi-enclosed area featuring a wooden gazebo before descending a flight of stone stairs toward the water's edge. The perspective then opens up onto the lower harbor promenade, passing a man in red and moving along stone paving. Finally, the path continues between a receding castle wall and a railing where a man in a striped shirt looks out over the dark harbor waters.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a rugged cliffside trail down to a wooden pier overlooking a moonlit harbor. It begins along a narrow dirt path cut into a rock face, where the environment shifts from stone architecture to natural cliffside with increasing vegetation along the edges. As the path descends and bends, the view opens up to reveal a sailing ship moored nearby, leading the camera directly onto a long wooden pier. The scene then extends across the creaking planks of the dock, passing closely by the moored ship on the left. Finally, the movement comes to a halt at the pier's edge, opening into a wide vista of the expansive water and the illuminated city skyline under a clear night sky.
